en: And as soon as it was morning, the chief priests held a consultation with the elders and scribes and the whole Council. And they bound Jesus and led him away and delivered him over to Pilate.
zh: 一到清晨，祭司長和長老、經學家以及公議會全體一致議決，把耶穌綁起來，押去交給彼拉多。

en: And Pilate asked him, "Are you the King of the Jews?" And he answered him, "You have said so."
zh: 彼拉多問他：“你是猶太人的王嗎？”耶穌回答：“你已經說了 。”

en: And the chief priests accused him of many things.
zh: 祭司長控告了他許多事。

en: And Pilate again asked him, "Have you no answer to make? See how many charges they bring against you."
zh: 彼拉多又問他：“你看，他們控告你這麼多的事！你甚麼都不回答嗎？”

en: But Jesus made no further answer, so that Pilate was amazed.
zh: 耶穌還是一言不答，使彼拉多非常驚奇。

en: Now at the feast he used to release for them one prisoner for whom they asked.
zh: 每逢這節期，彼拉多按著眾人所要求的，照例給他們釋放一個囚犯。

en: And among the rebels in prison, who had committed murder in the insurrection, there was a man called Barabbas.
zh: 有一個人名叫巴拉巴，和作亂的人囚禁在一起，他們作亂的時候，曾殺過人。

en: And the crowd came up and began to ask Pilate to do as he usually did for them.
zh: 群眾上去，要求彼拉多援例給他們辦理。

en: And he answered them, saying, "Do you want me to release for you the King of the Jews?"
zh: 彼拉多回答他們：“你們要我給你們釋放這個猶太人的王嗎？”

en: For he perceived that it was out of envy that the chief priests had delivered him up.
zh: 他知道祭司長是因為嫉妒才把耶穌交了來。

en: But the chief priests stirred up the crowd to have him release for them Barabbas instead.
zh: 祭司長卻煽動群眾，寧可要總督釋放巴拉巴給他們。

en: And Pilate again said to them, "Then what shall I do with the man you call the King of the Jews?"
zh: 彼拉多又對他們說：“那麼，你們稱為猶太人的王的，你們要我怎樣處置他呢？”

en: And they cried out again, "Crucify him."
zh: 他們就喊著說：“把他釘十字架！”

en: And Pilate said to them, "Why, what evil has he done?" But they shouted all the more, "Crucify him."
zh: 彼拉多說：“他作了甚麼惡事呢？”眾人卻更加大聲喊叫：“把他釘十字架！”

en: So Pilate, wishing to satisfy the crowd, released for them Barabbas, and having scourged Jesus, he delivered him to be crucified.
zh: 彼拉多有意討好群眾，就釋放了巴拉巴給他們，把耶穌鞭打了，交給他們釘十字架。

en: And the soldiers led him away inside the palace (that is, the governor's headquarters), and they called together the whole battalion.
zh: 士兵把耶穌帶進總督府的院子裡，召集了全隊士兵。

en: And they clothed him in a purple cloak, and twisting together a crown of thorns, they put it on him.
zh: 他們給他披上紫色的外袍，又用荊棘編成冠冕給他戴上；

en: And they began to salute him, "Hail, King of the Jews!"
zh: 就向他祝賀說：“猶太人的王萬歲！”

en: And they were striking his head with a reed and spitting on him and kneeling down in homage to him.
zh: 又用一根蘆葦打他的頭，向他吐唾沫，並且跪下來拜他。

en: And when they had mocked him, they stripped him of the purple cloak and put his own clothes on him. And they led him out to crucify him.
zh: 他們戲弄完了，就把他的紫色的外袍脫下，給他穿回自己的衣服，帶他出去，要釘十字架。

en: And they compelled a passerby, Simon of Cyrene, who was coming in from the country, the father of Alexander and Rufus, to carry his cross.
zh: 有一個古利奈人西門，就是亞歷山大和魯孚的父親，從鄉下來到，經過那裡，士兵就強迫他背著耶穌的十字架。

en: And they brought him to the place called Golgotha (which means Place of a Skull).
zh: 他們把耶穌帶到各各他地方 ，

en: And they offered him wine mixed with myrrh, but he did not take it.
zh: 拿沒藥調和的酒給他，他卻不接受。

en: And they crucified him and divided his garments among them, casting lots for them, to decide what each should take.
zh: 他們就把他釘了十字架；又抽籤分他的衣服，看誰得著甚麼。

en: And it was the third hour when they crucified him.
zh: 他們釘他十字架的時候，是在上午九點鐘。

en: And the inscription of the charge against him read, "The King of the Jews."
zh: 耶穌的罪狀牌上寫著“猶太人的王”。

en: And with him they crucified two robbers, one on his right and one on his left.
zh: 他們又把兩個強盜和他一同釘十字架，一個在右，一個在左。

en: And those who passed by derided him, wagging their heads and saying, "Aha! You who would destroy the temple and rebuild it in three days,
zh: 過路的人譏笑他，搖著頭說：“哼，你這個要拆毀聖所，三日之內又把它建造起來的，

en: save yourself, and come down from the cross!"
zh: 從十字架上把自己救下來吧！”

en: So also the chief priests with the scribes mocked him to one another, saying, "He saved others; he cannot save himself.
zh: 祭司長和經學家也同樣譏笑他，彼此說：“他救了別人，卻不能救自己；

en: Let the Christ, the King of Israel, come down now from the cross that we may see and believe." Those who were crucified with him also reviled him.
zh: 以色列的王基督啊，現在可以從十字架上下來，讓我們看見就信吧。”那和他同釘十字架的人也侮辱他。

en: And when the sixth hour had come, there was darkness over the whole land until the ninth hour.
zh: 從正午到下午三點鐘，遍地都黑暗了。

en: And at the ninth hour Jesus cried with a loud voice, "Eloi, Eloi, lema sabachthani?" which means, "My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?"
zh: 下午三點的時候，耶穌大聲呼號：“以羅伊，以羅伊，拉馬撒巴各大尼？”這句話譯出來就是：“我的 神，我的 神，你為甚麼離棄我？”

en: And some of the bystanders hearing it said, "Behold, he is calling Elijah."
zh: 有些站在旁邊的人聽見了就說：“看，他呼叫以利亞呢。”

en: And someone ran and filled a sponge with sour wine, put it on a reed and gave it to him to drink, saying, "Wait, let us see whether Elijah will come to take him down."
zh: 有一個人跑去拿海綿浸滿了酸酒，綁在蘆葦上，遞給他喝，說：“等一等，我們看看以利亞來不來救他。”

en: And Jesus uttered a loud cry and breathed his last.
zh: 耶穌大叫一聲，氣就斷了。

en: And the curtain of the temple was torn in two, from top to bottom.
zh: 聖所裡的幔子，從上到下裂成兩半。

en: And when the centurion, who stood facing him, saw that in this way he breathed his last, he said, "Truly this man was the Son of God!"
zh: 站在他對面的百夫長，看見他這樣斷氣，就說：“這人真是 神的兒子！”

en: There were also women looking on from a distance, among whom were Mary Magdalene, and Mary the mother of James the younger and of Joses, and Salome.
zh: 也有些婦女遠遠地觀看，她們之中有抹大拉的馬利亞，小雅各和約西的母親馬利亞，以及撒羅米。

en: When he was in Galilee, they followed him and ministered to him, and there were also many other women who came up with him to Jerusalem.
zh: 這些婦女，當耶穌在加利利的時候，就一直跟隨他、服事他。此外，還有許多和他一同上耶路撒冷的婦女。

en: And when evening had come, since it was the day of Preparation, that is, the day before the Sabbath,
zh: 到了晚上，因為是預備日，就是安息日的前一日，

en: Joseph of Arimathea, a respected member of the Council, who was also himself looking for the kingdom of God, took courage and went to Pilate and asked for the body of Jesus.
zh: 一個一向等候 神國度的尊貴的議員，亞利馬太的約瑟來了，就放膽地進去見彼拉多，求領耶穌的身體。

en: Pilate was surprised to hear that he should have already died. And summoning the centurion, he asked him whether he was already dead.
zh: 彼拉多驚訝耶穌已經死了，就叫百夫長前來，問他耶穌是不是死了很久。

en: And when he learned from the centurion that he was dead, he granted the corpse to Joseph.
zh: 他從百夫長知道了實情以後，就把屍體給了約瑟。

en: And Joseph bought a linen shroud, and taking him down, wrapped him in the linen shroud and laid him in a tomb that had been cut out of the rock. And he rolled a stone against the entrance of the tomb.
zh: 約瑟買了細麻布，把耶穌取下，用細麻布裹好，安放在一個從磐石鑿出來的墳墓裡，又輥過一塊石頭來擋住墓門。

en: Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of Joses saw where he was laid.
zh: 抹大拉的馬利亞和約西的母親馬利亞都看見安放他的地方。
